question: What acount had our biggest expense in q1 this year?
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+3 month', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Account AS Account_name FROM master_txn_table WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month') AND Transaction_TYPE = 'expense' GROUP BY Account ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What was the lowest bill Priscilla Howard received from William Jones?
gold_sql: select min(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Priscilla Howard" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "William Jones"
generated_sql:
SELECT MIN(master_txn_table.Amount) AS lowest_bill
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
JOIN vendors ON master_txn_table.Vendor = vendors.Vendor_name
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Priscilla Howard' AND vendors.Vendor_name = 'William Jones'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS year

question: What was the mean bill Shaun Bruce received from Eddie Harrison?
gold_sql: select avg(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Shaun Bruce" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Eddie Harrison"
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(master_txn_table.Amount) AS mean_bill_amount
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Shaun Bruce' 
AND employees.Employee_name = 'Eddie Harrison'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS period

question: How many Tina Adams invoices are still oustanding?
gold_sql: select count(distinct transaction_id) from master_txn_table where customers = "Tina Adams" and transaction_type = 'invoice' and open_balance>0
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_txn_table GROUP BY Customers WHERE Customers = 'Tina Adams' AND AR_paid = 'No';

question: How many Bedding did we sell to Joseph Wiggins in q1 this year?
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Joseph Wiggins" and product_service = 'Bedding' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+3 month', '-1 day')
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(Qty) FROM master_txn_table JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Joseph Wiggins' AND products.Product_Service_type = 'Bedding' AND transaction_date BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month');

question: As of in q1 this year, how many invoices for Jessica Arroyo remained unpaid?
gold_sql: select count(distinct transaction_id) from master_txn_table where customers = "Jessica Arroyo" and transaction_type = 'invoice' and open_balance >0 and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+3 month', '-1 day')
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_txn_table WHERE Customers = 'Jessica Arroyo' AND Transaction_TYPE = 'invoice' AND AR_paid = 'No' AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now', 'start of quarter') AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now', 'start of quarter') - interval 3 month;

question: How many Helium did we sell to Dana Marshall MTD?
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Dana Marshall" and product_service = 'Helium' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "start of month") AND date( current_date)
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(Qty) AS total_sold FROM master_txn_table WHERE Product_Service = 'Helium' AND Customers = 'Dana Marshall' AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now');

question: What was the average bill Jasmine Martin received from Taylor Williams?
gold_sql: select avg(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Jasmine Martin" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Taylor Williams"
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(master_txn_table.Amount) AS avg_bill
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.CreatedUSER = employees.Employee_ID
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Jasmine Martin' AND employees.Employee_name = 'Taylor Williams'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS year

question: How many Grapefruit oil did we sell to Lisa Reyes This week to date?
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Lisa Reyes" and product_service = 'Grapefruit oil' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(Qty) FROM master_txn_table JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Lisa Reyes' AND products.Product_Service = 'Grapefruit oil' AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0');

question: What was the lowest invoice value for Coal exploration in in dec last year?
gold_sql: select min(credit) from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'invoice' and instr(account,"Coal exploration") and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+11 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+12 month', '-1 day')
generated_sql: SELECT MIN(Credit) AS Lowest_Invoice_Value FROM master_txn_table WHERE Product_Service = 'Coal exploration' AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-1 month','1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','-1 month','31 day') AND Account_type = 'Asset'

question: What was the max invoice value for Purchases in Last quarter?
gold_sql: select max(credit) from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'invoice' and instr(account,"Purchases") and transaction_date < strftime('%Y-%m-%d', strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') || '-' || substr('00' || (((strftime('%m', 'now') - 1) / 3) * 3 + 4), -2, 2) || '-01')
generated_sql: SELECT MAX(Credit) AS max_invoice_value FROM master_txn_table WHERE Transaction_TYPE = 'Purchase' AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 month') AND Account_type = 'Asset'

question: What was the average bill William Wiley received from Heather Clay?
gold_sql: select avg(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "William Wiley" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Heather Clay"
generated_sql: SELECT AVG(master_txn_table.Amount) FROM master_txn_table JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID GROUP BY customers.customer_full_name, employees.Employee_name WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'William Wiley' AND employees.Employee_name = 'Heather Clay';

question: What was the lowest invoice value for Purchases in in may last year?
gold_sql: select min(credit) from master_txn_table where transaction_type = 'invoice' and instr(account,"Purchases") and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+4 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+5 month', '-1 day')
generated_sql: SELECT MIN(Credit) AS Lowest_Invoice_Value FROM master_txn_table WHERE Transaction_TYPE = 'Purchase' AND Account_type = 'Asset' AND strftime('%Y-%m', Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now', '-1 year', 'start of month');

question: When was the last time we sold Bangalow
gold_sql: select transaction_date from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and product_service = "Bangalow" order by transaction_date desc limit 1
generated_sql: SELECT MAX(transaction_date) AS last_sale_date FROM master_txn_table GROUP BY Product_Service WHERE Product_Service = 'Bangalow';

question: What our monthly spend on Heather Pratt
gold_sql: select date(transaction_date, 'start of month'), sum(debit) from master_txn_table where vendor = "Heather Pratt" group by date(transaction_date, 'start of month')
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Heather Pratt'
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date('now'));

question: How many Swimming pool Cleaning did we sell to Regina Clark DDS in may last year?
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Regina Clark DDS" and product_service = 'Swimming pool Cleaning' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+4 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+5 month', '-1 day')
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_txn_table JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name GROUP BY customers.customer_full_name WHERE master_txn_table.Product_Service = 'Swimming pool Cleaning' AND customers.customer_full_name = 'Regina Clark DDS' AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = '2022-05';
